creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Created attachment 239045
Update to 1.28.0

Update gnustep-make to the latest 1.28.0
Full changelog can be found here:

https://github.com/gnustep/libs-base/releases/tag/base-1_28_0

I made changes to the Makefile to (mostly) satisfy portclippy.

I have no idea how many projects use this, so it might possibly have a lot of impact on other projects.
The only ports I tested this with are devel/sope and www/sogo.
